hypothesis: Silicon-based alloy anodes whose CHGNet-relaxed structures show less than 0.3 Å variation in the largest continuous Li+ migration channel radius between fully lithiated and delithiated states will exhibit Li diffusion coefficients that change by no more than ±20% (measured by 300 K DFT-MD) and retain >80% of initial specific capacity after 200 galvanostatic lithiation/delithiation cycles in half-cell experiments.
